documentation.description: Socket option configuration for Aion networking.

record_types.name: Socket_Options

constants.name: Default_TCP
constants.code:
Default_TCP : constant Socket_Options :=
  (Reuse_Address      => True,
   Keep_Alive         => True,
   No_Delay           => True,
   Broadcast          => False,
   Receive_Timeout_Ms => 0,
   Send_Timeout_Ms    => 0);

constants.name: Default_UDP
constants.code:
Default_UDP : constant Socket_Options :=
  (Reuse_Address      => True,
   Keep_Alive         => False,
   No_Delay           => False,
   Broadcast          => False,
   Receive_Timeout_Ms => 0,
   Send_Timeout_Ms    => 0);

subprograms.name: Apply_TCP
Apply_UDP
